Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Aanand Mehtani, Esq. 310-776-3590 Mehtani Law Offices PC for Plaintiff.
Peter Clarides, Esq. 415-732-1744 for Defendant CMS Security, In-person.

ARGUED. Mr. Clarides informs the Court there is a bankruptcy case and notic eof stay is still pending on efiling. Counsel provides a copy of the bankruptcy papers to the Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEYMONTAE GIBSON'S Motion To Enforce Settlement.

Case is stayed pending the bankruptcy case.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
